name: evm-executor
title: Minimal Geth Fork as EVM Execution Engine for Enterprise zkEVM L2
hypothesis: A minimal fork of go-ethereum can execute EVM transactions with custom state management, producing execution traces (storage reads/writes, opcodes executed) necessary for ZK witness generation, while maintaining 100% Cancun opcode compatibility and processing 1000+ simple transactions per second.
null_hypothesis: A minimal Geth fork cannot achieve 1000+ tx/s with trace generation, requiring either a custom EVM implementation or accepting lower throughput.
